urdu transliteration text: Masnade e gham bichayi jaati hai
english translation text: The throne of sorrow is being prepared
The assembly place for Matam is being decorated

urdu transliteration text:
Ran ko akbar chale to maa ne kaha
Umr bhar ki kamayi jaati hai
losing her life savings
english translation text: Aliakbar charges to the battlefield and mother says

urdu transliteration text: Masnade e gham bichayi jaati hai
english translation text: The throne of sorrow is being prepared

urdu transliteration text: Masnade e gham bichayi jaati hai
english translation text: The throne of sorrow is being prepared

urdu transliteration text:
Khoon may doobe hai yun ali akbar
Ali Akbar is drenched in blood
Jaise chadar udayi jaati hai
Like a shroud is spread over someone
Masnade e gham bichayi jaati hai
english translation text: The throne of sorrow is being prepared

urdu transliteration text:
Kisko ghayre hue hai hai ahle haram
Kiski mannat badhayi jaati hai
english translation text:
Who are the Ahle-Haram surrounding
(and) whose vow are they trying to fulfill

urdu transliteration text: Masnade e gham bichayi jaati hai
english translation text: The throne of sorrow is being prepared

urdu transliteration text: Teer gardan pe khalo ay asghar
Pyas yun bhi bujhayi jaati hai
english translation text: Ali Asghar you receive the arrow on your neck, that can quench your thirst too

urdu transliteration text: Masnade e gham bichayi jaati hai
english translation text: The throne of sorrow is being prepared

urdu transliteration text:
Yaad aati hai ek nanhi lehad
A tiny grave comes to mind
Jab bhi shamma jalayi  jaati hai
whenever candles are lit
Masnade e gham bichayi jaati hai
english translation text: The throne of sorrow is being prepared
